Video.summary: An Australian Shepherd behaves aggressively after being attacked by a couple of dogs; a shelter dog won't stop biting and snapping at potential owners.
Video.title: Not-So-Sweet Snickers

Video.summary: An aggressive Manchester Terrier; a Wheaton Terrier with poor social skills; a dog who is afraid of the ocean.
Video.title: Beach Blues

Video.summary: A couple of German shepherd pups with a shadowy obedience track records; a rescue dog with trust issues.
Video.title: Shadow Dogs

Video.summary: Nate Brouwer and Charnae Wright bonded through their love of dogs and the outdoors, but their feuding dogs are threatening to tear them apart.
Video.title: No Man's Land

Video.summary: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.
Video.title: Year of the Dog

Video.summary: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.
Video.title: The Dog Squad

Video.summary: Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.
Video.title: Harry and Brooks

Video.summary: Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.
Video.title: Not So Goodfellas

Video.summary: Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.
Video.title: Nunu and Kane

Video.summary: Cesar helps Caper, a miniature Doberman rescue dog whose never been trained and Julius, a pit bull who is scared of everything.
Video.title: Caper and Julius

Video.summary: Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.
Video.title: Josh and Boomer

Video.summary: Churchill is usually a well-mannered dog, but around other animals he's a monster, and lovable pit bull Maya can be a handful.
Video.title: Churchill and Maya

Video.summary: Ava, a small mixed-breed spins constantly; Gus, a large dog who greets people by throwing its body at them.
Video.title: Gus and Ava

Video.summary: A 12-year-old beagle mix displays unpredictable aggression; a couple tries to fit an aggressive puppy into their family.
Video.title: Alice and J

Video.summary: An owner worries that her Doberman suffers from separation anxiety; a yellow lab has a problem with biting.
Video.title: Sunshine and Teddy

Video.summary: A German shepherd needs help with his territorial tendencies, and a dachshund has a habit of biting.
Video.title: Lotus Blossoms

Video.summary: Emily, the pit bull, is sent to doggie boot camp because she is so quick to attack other dogs that her owners can no longer walk her.
Video.title: Emily

Video.summary: A couple fear their border terrier is untrainable; an excitable English bulldog causes trouble for its owner.
Video.title: Bella and Jordan

Video.summary: Cesar helps a Rottweiler who has suffered a lifetime of abuse adjust to her new life after finally finding a loving home.
Video.title: Nicki

Video.summary: Cesar takes the spoiled Bubba down a notch; discover why German shepherd Garret never stops chasing his tail.
Video.title: Bubba and Garrett

Video.summary: A terrier rescued via the Internet is a handful to manage and bites anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters; pit bull problems.
Video.title: Percy and Justice

Video.summary: When Linda tries to walk Jake, he goes mad to protect her; Chantel wants to walk her 150-pound Rottweiler King.
Video.title: Jake and King

Video.summary: A family's new Great Dane moves in on its other dog's territory; Cesar helps Los Angeles' animal-control department with its new pet-ownership program.
Video.title: Great Pains

Video.summary: A wheelchair-bound owner wants to keep her German shepherd Shep in line; Sasha, the Lhasa apso, must learn who's boss.
Video.title: Shep and Sasha

Video.summary: A pit bull/chow mix has an extreme fear of the stove; a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control; a Jack Russell terrier cannot handle the loss of its pack leader.
Video.title: Cat Worshipper

Video.summary: A feral dog refuses to be caught; the addition of an English bulldog disrupts the harmonious relationship of a boxer and a cocker spaniel; a pit bull terrier refuses to go for walks.
Video.title: Pooch Potato

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help Slick a fear-ridden dog who was rescued after living in a crate for 15 hours a day and Pepper, another rescue dog with issues.
Video.title: Slick & Pepper

Video.summary: Scrawny is the favorite dog in his household, but popularity has gone to his head; Lola the Dalmatian is spoiled.
Video.title: Scrawny and Lola

Video.summary: An American Eskimo dog attacks doors and windows whenever people pass; a Shiba Inu overprotects his corgi playmate; two bulldogs are aggressive.
Video.title: Kill or Be Killed

Video.summary: A family's German shepherd will only listen to one person; a Brittany spaniel becomes aggressive around female dogs.
Video.title: Pepsi and Goldie

Video.summary: A charmer around people, Opie becomes aggressive around other dogs; Flirt the Chinese Crested is hyper and neurotic.
Video.title: Flirt and Opie

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help a boxer named Coach before he is put down for biting someone; Sueki turns her nose up at leads.
Video.title: Sueki and Coach

Video.summary: A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.
Video.title: Ruby and Rana

Video.summary: A rescued mastiff likes to chew everything and barks incessantly; Paris is a temperamental, long-haired Chihuahua.
Video.title: Hank and Paris

Video.summary: TV personality Ed McMahon has an aggressive wheaten terrier; a beagle does not leave the house; an Australian shepherd is so territorial no one has visited his home in years.
Video.title: Home Alone
